title: Chapter 84
content:
Chapter 84: Chapter 84: Heat Inside

The movement was devastating.

Because her leg was elevated, the high slit of the crimson qipao fell completely open. The silk fabric pooled around her hip, exposing the entirety of her incredibly thick, plush thigh. She was wearing sheer, expensive black silk stockings that clung perfectly to her plump calves, held up by an intricate lace garter belt wrapped tightly around her upper thigh. Above the garter, there was a tantalizing two inches of bare, milky-white skin leading up to her waist.

Kai stared at the expanse of thigh resting across his thighs, the heat of her leg seeping through his Academy trousers, right next to his waking erection.

"My calf is terribly knotted," Su Mei instructed softly, her voice trembling slightly with anticipation.

Kai didn’t say a word. He mentally activated the skill.

[Skill Activated: Hands of Lecher Lvl 1]

He placed both hands on her calf, wrapping his long fingers around the thick, silk-clad muscle.

"Ahh!"

Su Mei let out a sharp, genuine gasp the moment his skin made contact. Her entire body jolted, her massive breasts bouncing heavily.

"Kai..." she breathed, her eyes widening in shock. "Your hands... they are so... hot."

It wasn’t just physical heat. The moment the

Hands of Lecher touched her, a wave of liquid pleasure shot straight up her leg, bypassing her brain and striking directly at her womb. The sheer intensity of the sensation made her toes curl inside her high heel.

"Just relax, Aunty," Kai commanded gently, his voice acting as an anchor in the sudden storm of her arousal.

He began to knead the thick muscle of her calf. He didn’t use brute force; he used slow, agonizingly firm pressure. With every squeeze, the magical energy from his skill seeped through the silk stocking, melting the tension in her muscles and replacing it with raw, burning lust.

"Oh... oh heavens..." Su Mei moaned, her sultry facade completely shattering.

She let her head fall back against the carriage wall. Her mouth fell open, a soft, continuous whimper escaping her glossy red lips. The jiggling of the carriage combined with the firm, burning pressure of his hands was driving her insane.

Kai moved his hands higher, sliding over the curve of her knee. The silk stocking was incredibly smooth, offering no resistance to his gliding palms.

"You are very tense here," Kai noted, his thumbs pressing into the soft flesh just above her kneecap.

"Yes... mmph... yes, right there..." Su Mei babbled, her hips subconsciously squirming on the velvet seat. Her massive, heavy breasts heaved with her ragged breathing, the crimson silk looking like it was about to tear from the strain.

Kai slid his hands up. He bypassed the knee entirely and grabbed the lower half of her incredibly thick, soft thigh.

The flesh here was impossibly plush. Kai’s large hands sank deep into the yielding fat and muscle. He squeezed, using the

Hands of Lecher to target the sensitive nerve endings hidden beneath the sheer stocking.

"Aahhn! Kai!" Su Mei cried out, her back arching off the seat.

The pleasure was blinding. It felt like his hands were wired directly to her clitoris. Every time he kneaded her thigh, a pulse of pure, wet electricity shot through her crotch. Her expensive lace panties were already soaked through, sticking uncomfortably to her weeping folds.

"Does that feel good, Aunty?" Kai whispered, slowly dragging his hot palms higher up her thigh, inching dangerously close to the lace garter belt.

"It feels... it feels like magic..." Su Mei sobbed, her heavily lined eyes fluttering open, completely glazed over with lust. She looked at the handsome, muscular boy massaging her leg. He looked like a demon of pleasure.

"Deeper, Kai," she begged, completely throwing away the dignity of a high-class noblewoman. She spread her elevated leg just a fraction wider, giving him better access to the soft, incredibly sensitive inner meat of her thigh. "Please... touch me higher."

Kai smirked, the magical heat in his hands pulsing in rhythm with the throbbing of his own massive, rock-hard erection beneath her resting calf.

"As you wish, Aunty."
